name: clean-no-violations
description: A refactor that moves logic within the same layer — no boundary crossings, no new coupling.

pr.title: Extract useSessionState hook from SessionPanel
pr.author: maya
pr.description: Extract the local session state logic from SessionPanel into a dedicated useSessionState hook. Pure UI-layer refactor, no new dependencies.

agentResponse.summary: The refactor stays entirely within the UI component layer. No layer boundaries are crossed and no new inter-module coupling is introduced.
